chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1122 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.11002/2017. For orders on MA No.11003/2017. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2017 and it came up in Court lastly on 07.09.2017 and thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. Even the petitioner has not attempted to fix the matter in Court. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
